schema_version: v0 — migrates when Q6 (intention envelope) lands
owner: akiendelllinux_cc_0 (CC) — CC gates writes; the learning intent is Akien's ratified I-learns-its-gates.
intention: A store + record format that captures CC-preference feedback richer than CC++/CC-- — each record ties to a specific gate and carries decision, context, outcome, Akien's correction (if any), a confidence-move, and provenance — and starts capturing TODAY. CC preferences = choices CC learned reduce friction, recorded for its own later use (not settings).
why: CC++/CC-- is too thin a field to move a gate's confidence. Gate-learning (I-learns-its-gates) needs structured evidence: what call was made, how Akien responded, which gate it bears on. Build now (ratified amendment), not when the shim exists — this session is record #1. The chat logs are the raw material; this is the first place they compile into learning.
gates: proof gate (tester) — IOU: tester not built. Interim proof: proofs/ shows a real record round-trips (write → recall) and is attributable to a named gate; and the store answers its own 'how does this component learn?' (dogfood — it learns by accumulating records that move gate-confidences). Durability gate (code-seam): not done until tested AND committed.
falsifier: a real feedback-record from THIS session is captured, points at a specific gate, and is surfaced when a like decision recurs later. Wrong-shape signal: the record format is so heavy that capture stops happening (friction > value) — if records dry up, simplify the format; sparse-but-real beats rich-but-empty.
horizon: re-check after a stretch of real capture: are records actually moving gate-confidences, or just accumulating? And when the CC shim lands — the store migrates into it (Law 6).
touches: CairnCommons/learning/ — v0 store born here (knowledge; losing it loses knowledge). Format doc + seeded session records.
later: capture mechanism as code in class-space (cairn/), co-located intention+why.json + proofs (Law 5).
later: fold the existing harness auto-memory (~/.claude feedback memories) in as proto-records; migrate the whole store into the CC shim.
open_question: commons-shared vs instance-local record data (inherited from parent I-learns-its-gates): does a fresh CC on another device inherit the accumulated wisdom, or is it this-device-only? Shim owns it either way (Law 6); shareability is the shim charter's call.
provenance: cast 2026-07-16 via /sorted, under I-learns-its-gates immediately after its ratification. The first endpoint the learning-as-a-pattern node generalizes from.
